title: CNH FieldOps Vehicle Telemetry
description: ISO 15143-3 vehicle telemetry payload returned by the CNH FieldOps API. Two profiles are supported: CP (CAN Parameter) and MH (Machine Health).

profile.description: CP = CAN Parameter profile (default). MH = Machine Health profile.

operatingHours.description: Engine operating hours over the window.

idleHours.description: Engine idle hours over the window.

fuelRemainingRatio.description: Fraction of tank fuel remaining at end of window.

peakDailySpeed.description: Peak ground speed observed during the window (km/h).

distance.description: Total distance travelled in the window (km).

errorTags.description: Comma-separated error/quality tags (e.g. NO_GPS_FIX, NULL_DATA, UNREALISTIC_VALUE).
